growth_modifiers.unlock_condition: Stage progression unlocks Phantom Left tiers

special_moves.name: Phantom Left
special_moves.effect: Curve shot. Opponent GK BLOCK -15. Ball trajectory changes after release (RNG dodge chance 20%).

special_moves.name: Phantom Left — Tier 2
special_moves.effect: Enhanced curve. GK BLOCK -25. RNG dodge chance 35%. Can be chained from Miracle Combo (Pass source must be Kubo or Hiramatsu).

special_moves.name: Phantom Left — Limit Break
special_moves.effect: One use per match. SHOOT becomes 255. GK BLOCK -40. Triggers mandatory cinematic. Cannot be countered except by GK with BLOCK ≥ 240.

special_moves.name: Gotoh Memorial Drive
special_moves.effect: Precision through-ball. Target ally gets +20 SHOOT on their next action this turn. Inspired by Coach Gotoh's tactical teachings.

special_moves.name: Kubo's Dash
special_moves.effect: Solo sprint. Bypasses first TACKLE encounter automatically (treated as win). Second TACKLE encounter in same chain is resolved normally. SPEED stat added to DRIBBLE check.

special_moves.name: Kubo Solo Run — Chain
special_moves.effect: Each successful dribble in chain refills 10 GUTS to all allies. Chain breaks on first loss. Each consecutive success adds +5 cumulative DRIBBLE bonus.

special_moves.name: Miracle Combo — Initiate
special_moves.effect: Initiates Miracle Combo chain. If Toshihiko or Hiramatsu receives, next SHOOT gets +25 bonus and -10 GK BLOCK penalty. Consumed on receipt.

passive_abilities.name: Captain's Aura
passive_abilities.effect: All Kakegawa players within 'zone' (passing range) get +5 to all stats passively while Hiramatsu is on field and GUTS > 30.

passive_abilities.name: Tactical Read
passive_abilities.effect: Once per match, after an opponent TACKLE encounter win, Hiramatsu can force a re-roll (one use).

special_moves.name: Precision Cross
special_moves.effect: Aerial cross to striker. If recipient is Toshihiko, SHOOT +30 on header attempt. Bypasses PASS-CUT encounter (no interception chance on this move).

special_moves.name: Slide Tackle — Captain
special_moves.effect: Hard slide. On win: ball recovered + opponent enters 1-turn fumble state (cannot pass or shoot). On lose: Hiramatsu 'minor injury' — SPEED -10 for 2 turns.

special_moves.name: Halftime Rally
special_moves.effect: Cutscene triggers. All ally GUTS restored to 60% max. All ally base stats +10 for second half. One-time per match.

special_moves.name: Punch Clear
special_moves.effect: Aerial clearance. Used in aerial/corner encounters. Clears ball to midfield — triggers Kakegawa possession (skips opponent turn).

special_moves.name: Dive Save
special_moves.effect: Full-extension dive. +35 BLOCK. On success: gains 'Read' passive for that shot type for remainder of match (-15 penalty on same move removed).

special_moves.name: Quick Distribute
special_moves.effect: Fast throw to flanks after save. Initiates fast-break — next Kakegawa action this turn costs -5 GUTS.

special_moves.name: Overlap Run
special_moves.effect: Wide overlap. If successful, creates 2v1 — next pass cannot be intercepted (PASS-CUT auto-fail for opponent).

special_moves.name: Cutback Cross
special_moves.effect: Low cutback from byline. Receiver (Toshihiko preferred) gets +20 SHOOT and shot auto-targets near post (GK positioning penalty -10).

special_moves.name: Crunching Tackle
special_moves.effect: High-risk tackle. On win: ball stolen + opponent player -20 SPEED for 3 turns. On lose: foul called (opponent free kick, player suspended 1 turn).

special_moves.name: Spiral Drive
special_moves.effect: Spinning low shot. GK BLOCK -25. Triggers separate 'spin' RNG: 30% chance ball deflects off post into net even on a 'failed' GK save roll.

special_moves.name: Counter Press
special_moves.effect: Immediate press after losing ball. Forces another TACKLE encounter before opponent can pass. One use per possession loss.

special_moves.name: Power Blast
special_moves.effect: Straight power shot. No curve. GK must survive BLOCK check or animation shows GK knocked backwards (fail animation triggers automatic goal). Highest raw SHOOT damage in Stages 1-6.

special_moves.name: Pressure Mark
special_moves.effect: Tight man-mark. Target player loses -15 DRIBBLE for 2 turns if tackle wins. Represents Arakawa's controlling, suppressive style.
